prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SLUICEBOXSET-7PC-BUNDLE-ALUM Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 7pc Beginner Gold Panning Sluice Box Kit for Adults Starting to Pan for Gold Description: The ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime!

The backbone of this kit is made up of the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Gold Sluice Box for Gold Prospecting features a 3-piece folding design and a 50-inch gravity fed sluice box channel with zinc plated riffle traps creating this high recovery gold prospecting and mineral collection prospecting and gold panning tool. Extremely portable, folding down in size simply by loosening the connecting wing nuts, it will pack right up into your backpack. You're ready to prospect for gold right out of the package with woven vinyl miners moss included and installed.

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining with the ASR Outdoor Aluminum Folding Gold Sluice Box.

This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere!

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar cheaper models in that they would often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The gold sluice box carry strap is removable and extends to 50 inches so that it can be used both as a hand or shoulder strap. This allows the carry strap to be easily removed when the sluice is in action.

The sluice box riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long, rust-free service.

It even comes with miner's moss and carpet already installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own when starting out.

In addition to the sluice box, we've included a 10" diameter gold pan with dual riffles and fine gold recovery tools for collecting your gems and minerals. We also added in a heavy duty trowel, a 10x magnifying loupe and a set of magnifying tweezers to help you identify and evaluate your findings. This is a great prospecting kit for beginners, intermediate and expert prospectors alike! Search Terms: gold panning prospecting sifting tools sluice box classifier screen set gem collecting hock hounding adventure mineral collection outdoor gifts for dad Features: - HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: 18 Gauge steel zinc-plated riffles are built in throughout the sediment channel trapping gold flake and small gold nuggets in the woven vinyl miners moss which is pre-installed and ready to use out of the box - MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY: The Entire Sluice Box is 50 inches in Length with a 10-inch Wide Riffle Channel; 3-inch High Channel Walls; 16 inch Flared Opening Designed to Increase the Volume of Water Entering the Riffled Sediment Channel, While Increasing the Flow Rate though the Sluice Box - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made to be used. designed to be portable the ASR Outdoor Folding Backpack Sluice Box for Gold Recovery is lightweight made from highly-durable aluminum. It will surly withstand the harshest environments - EFFORTLESS USE: Everything can be packed up in your backpack ready to deploy. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning - TRIED AND TRUE: High quality components that won't fail you when you need reliability in the field. The ASR Outdoor 7 piece Gold Sluicing kit will get you the results you're looking for === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
